name: DOMINOS PIZZA INC
summary: Dominos Pizza, Inc. is the largest pizza company in the world with more than 22,100 locations in over 90 markets as of December 28, 2025. Founded in 1960, the company operates as primarily a franchisor (~99% franchised), offering pizza with varying sizes and crust types, bread products, wings, boneless chicken, pastas, oven-baked sandwiches, soft drinks, and desserts. Revenues are generated through franchise royalties, supply chain sales to franchisees, and Company-owned store operations.

products.name: Pizza (hand-tossed, various sizes and crust types)
products.description: Core menu item including specialty pizzas; dough made fresh and distributed to stores.

products.name: Supply Chain Operations
products.description: Sale of food and other products to franchisees primarily in the U.S. and Canada.

partnerships.description: Multinational agreement allowing customers to order Dominos products through Uber's marketplace.
Multinational agreement allowing customers to order Dominos products through DoorDash's marketplace.
Largest franchisee by store count, operating 3,524 stores in 12 international markets.
